triage.reason: Q1324364 is 'homogeneous space' (a coset-space construction G/H), which is wrong — MulAction.IsPretransitive formalizes the *property* of an action having a single orbit, which maps directly to Q121074938 ('Transitive group action', 'group action with only one orbit').
triage.fix_hint: Replace Q1324364 (homogeneous space) with Q121074938 (Transitive group action) on the same declaration MulAction.IsPretransitive.

notes.text: Incorrect. This is a generalization of the Euler Charactaristic. The actual Euler Characteristic is the specialization of this definition to the singular homology complex.

triage.reason: Q852973's defining formula χ = b₀ − b₁ + b₂ − ⋯ uses Betti numbers (ranks of homology groups), which HomologicalComplex.homologyEulerChar directly formalizes; the rejected tag mistakenly pointed at HomologicalComplex.eulerChar, which sums chain-group ranks instead.
triage.fix_hint: Retag Q852973 to HomologicalComplex.homologyEulerChar (defined in the same file), whose type is the alternating finsum of rank(C.homology i) — the Betti-number formula that matches Wikidata's χ = b₀ − b₁ + b₂ − ⋯ exactly.
